summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Aptus Collared Investment Opportunity ETF (ACIO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US large cap equities as well as corresponding options collars for those constituents. ACIO was launched on Jul 10, 2019 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.

holdings.infoBox: ACIO is an equity ETF with a total of 212 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.84%, Apple at 7.12%, Alphabet at 5.82%, Microsoft at 4.38%, and Amazon.com at 3.71%.

summary.pre: ETF holdings data is provided by
summary.post: . Holdings are typically published by the ETF issuer at the end of each trading day.
